name: Flaming Sack
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Plink!
granted_abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may discard this upgrade to reduce the damage by 1.

granted_abilities.name: Steady Blow
granted_abilities.text: When this model removes an Impact token, it deals +2 damage instead of +1.

granted_actions.name: Flame Splat
granted_actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (x)2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token. Then, discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: The action icon shows (magic) symbol indicating a magic attack action
The 'x' in '(x)2"' represents a pulse icon

The action type symbol before Flame Splat is (sig) indicating a signature action marker, but the standard indicates sig represents an (f) icon which typically denotes general action. Based on the symbol (upward arrow), this appears to be a general action marker.
